label: Home
expected_behavior: Bottom-nav delegate (dashboard-ui.js:404) calls mobileNav('dash') -> goTo('dash') switches to the dashboard view; toggles .active onto #mni-dash and off the other MOBILE_NAV_TABS tiles; closes any open .map-sidebar.
notes: Bottom nav itself is display:none on desktop (>=769px) and display:flex on mobile (dashboard.html:4041/4288); reveal is viewport-gated. Default active on load.

label: Pipeline
expected_behavior: mobileNav('crm') -> goTo('crm') opens the Kanban pipeline view; marks #mni-crm active. The goTo wrapper (dashboard-ui.js:2186) mirrors #leadBadge count into #mni-crm-badge (shown when count != 0).
notes: Carries #mni-crm-badge (unread/new-lead count mirror). Badge starts .dn (hidden).

label: (Pipeline count badge)
expected_behavior: Non-interactive status indicator inside the Pipeline tab. goTo wrapper copies #leadBadge.textContent into it and sets display:block when count is truthy and != '0', else display:none. No own click handler.
notes: Inventoried as a distinct element because the critic flagged the mobile badge as missing; it is display-only, no tap target of its own.

label: New
expected_behavior: Orange center FAB. call delegate runs mCreateFabRoute() (dashboard-actions.js:134): if toggleMobileCreatePopover exists it opens the bottom-sheet Create popover (#mCreatePopover); otherwise falls back to openLeadModal().
notes: Primary mobile quick-add entry point. Does NOT navigate; opens the Create sheet (rows below).

label: Ask Joe
expected_behavior: mobileNav('joe') -> goTo('joe') opens the Ask Joe AI assistant view. 'joe' is not in MOBILE_NAV_TABS, so mobileNav deactivates all bottom tab tiles (no persistent active highlight).
notes: Not a member of MOBILE_NAV_TABS ['dash','map','crm','est'] so it never shows the .active state after tap.

label: More
expected_behavior: toggle delegate maps data-target=mobileMore -> toggleMobileMore() (dashboard-state.js:89): toggles .open on #mobile-more-menu (full-screen All Tools drawer), toggles .active on the More tile, and locks/unlocks body scroll (body.style.overflow='hidden' while open).
notes: Opens the More sheet (rows below). mobile-nav-customizer also dispatches toggleMore via data-mnc-action (mobile-nav-customizer.js:691) for the dynamic bar variant.

label: (Create sheet backdrop)
expected_behavior: Tapping the dimmed backdrop maps data-target=mobileCreatePopover -> closeMobileCreatePopover() (dashboard-state.js:117): sets #mCreateBackdrop.hidden and #mCreatePopover.hidden true, restores body scroll.
notes: Tap-outside-to-dismiss control for the FAB Create sheet.

label: New Lead
expected_behavior: _mCreate('lead') (dashboard-actions.js:1274) closes the Create popover then calls openLeadModal() to open the Add Lead form.

label: Photo
expected_behavior: _mCreate('photo') closes the popover then clicks the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput (type=file capture=environment), invoking the device camera/photo picker.
notes: Capture handled by _mCreatePhotoPicked (row gap-mobile-013).

label: Task
expected_behavior: _mCreate('task') closes the popover then opens openTaskModal() (falls back to openLeadModal() if the task modal fn is absent).
notes: Confirm whether openTaskModal is defined on the dashboard surface or only customer.html; falls back to lead modal otherwise.

label: D2D Knock
expected_behavior: _mCreate('knock') closes the popover then logs a door: prefers openKnock() (new knock at current GPS), else window.D2D.openNewKnock(), else goTo('d2d') as a navigation fallback.
notes: NBD-only row (no JobNimbus/CompanyCam equivalent per source comment).

label: Quick Note
expected_behavior: _mCreate('note') closes the popover then opens openLeadModal() (no standalone note flow yet — note captured on lead save).
notes: Known stub: routes to the lead modal rather than a dedicated note modal (TODO in source).

label: (hidden camera/file input)
expected_behavior: On change, _mCreatePhotoPicked(event) (dashboard-actions.js:1314) takes files[0]: if PhotoEngine.uploadOne exists it uploads with source 'mobile-create-popover' and toasts 'Photo uploaded'; else stashes the file on window._pendingPhotoUploads and toasts 'Photo queued'. Resets input value in finally.
notes: Shared capture input for both the Photo create-row and the view-photos shutter FAB.

label: Cancel
expected_behavior: closeModal->closeMobileCreatePopover() hides backdrop + popover and restores body scroll without performing any create action.
notes: Explicit dismiss control for the Create sheet (paired with backdrop gap-mobile-007).

label: (More drawer overlay)
expected_behavior: Tapping the overlay maps data-target=mobileMore -> closeMobileMore() (dashboard-state.js:118): removes .open from #mobile-more-menu, removes .active from #mni-more, restores body scroll.
notes: Tap-outside-to-dismiss for the All Tools drawer.

label: ✕ (Close All Tools)
expected_behavior: closeModal->closeMobileMore() closes the All Tools drawer (removes .open / .active, restores scroll).
notes: Header close button in the drawer.

label: Home (Core)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('home') -> goTo('home'); data-close-more present so delegate also calls closeMobileMore() to dismiss the drawer (dashboard-ui.js:409).
notes: All mm-item rows with data-close-more share the mobileNav+closeMobileMore path.

label: Dashboard (Core)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('dash') opens the dashboard view; closes the drawer.

label: Pipeline (Core)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('crm') opens the Kanban pipeline; closes the drawer.

label: Prospects (Core)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('prospects') opens the Prospects view; closes the drawer.

label: Estimate Builder (Core)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('est') opens the Estimate Builder view; closes the drawer.

label: Door-to-Door (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('d2d') opens the D2D tracker view; closes the drawer.
notes: Mobile equivalent of the desktop Tools drawer's D2D entry.

label: Maps & Pins (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('map') opens the Maps & Pins view; closes the drawer. 'map' is a MOBILE_NAV_TABS member so it can also show active in a customized bottom bar.

label: Damage Photos (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('photos') opens the view-photos surface (which exposes the shutter FAB on mobile); closes the drawer.

label: Templates (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('docs') opens the Templates view; closes the drawer.

label: Products (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('products') opens the Products view; closes the drawer.

label: Drawing Tool (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('draw') opens the Drawing Tool view; closes the drawer.

label: Sales Training (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('training') opens the Sales Training view; closes the drawer.

label: Real Deal Academy (Tools)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('academy') opens the Real Deal Academy view; closes the drawer.

label: Crew Calendar (Tools)
expected_behavior: call->openCrewCalendarFromMore() (dashboard-actions.js:124): if toggleCrewCalendar exists, opens the Crew Calendar overlay then mobileNav('home') to anchor the base view; always calls closeMobileMore() to dismiss the drawer.
notes: data-fn call (not a mobileNav route); no data-close-more attr — closeMobileMore is invoked inside the handler instead.

label: Storm Center (Insights)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('storm') opens the Storm Center view; closes the drawer.
notes: Mobile equivalent of the desktop Insights drawer entries.

label: Close Board (Insights)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('closeboard') opens the Close Board view; closes the drawer.

label: Rep OS (Insights)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('repos') opens the Rep OS view; closes the drawer.

label: Leaderboard (Insights)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('board') opens the Leaderboard view; closes the drawer.

label: Daily Program (Insights)
expected_behavior: call->openDailyProgramFromMore() (dashboard-actions.js:120): closeMobileMore() then window.location.href='/pro/daily-success' (full-page navigation away from the SPA to the daily-success page).
notes: Hard navigation (not a hash route); leaves the dashboard SPA.

label: API Analytics (Insights)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('aiusage') opens the API/AI usage analytics view; closes the drawer.
notes: May be role-gated (owner/admin cost visibility) at the view level; markup itself is always rendered in the drawer.

label: Ask Joe AI (System)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('joe') opens the Ask Joe AI view; closes the drawer. (Duplicate route of the bottom-nav Ask Joe tile.)

label: Settings (System)
expected_behavior: mobileNav('settings') opens the Settings view (which hosts the only sign-out/log-out control — there is no separate mobile-only sign-out button); closes the drawer.
notes: FINDING: no mobile-only sign-out exists; logout lives inside the Settings view reached here.

label: (Camera shutter FAB)
expected_behavior: Floating shutter button on the view-photos surface (mobile only, CSS-gated via #view-photos.active > .m-shutter-fab at <=768px). call->openPhotoEngineOrClickProxy('mCreatePhotoInput') opens PhotoEngine capture, falling back to clicking the hidden #mCreatePhotoInput (same capture path as the Photo create-row).
notes: Defined inside a <template> (cloned into view-photos at render time), so the live node only exists after the photos view mounts. Mobile-only; desktop uses the inline 'Open Camera' header button.
